properties.Test Case: Moving one corner of a bubble should not cause the opposite corner to move, even slightly. Compare BL-8077, though that was with an older resizing UI.
properties.Steps: Moving one corner of a bubble should not cause the opposite corner to move, even slightly. Compare BL-8077, though that was with an older resizing UI.

properties.Test Case: Images (but not currently image buttons) can be cropped using the handles on the sides. Try all four sides. The image should not move. As you drag outward, the handle should not move beyond the point where the image is no longer cropped. Watch out for rows of narrow lines being left behind during dragging, especially at zoom levels larger than 100%.
properties.Steps: Images (but not currently image buttons) can be cropped using the handles on the sides. Try all four sides. The image should not move. As you drag outward, the handle should not move beyond the point where the image is no longer cropped. Watch out for rows of narrow lines being left behind during dragging, especially at zoom levels larger than 100%.

properties.Test Case: When an image is cropped, an extra handle appears, a circle in the middle of the image. This handle allows adjusting the cropping by moving the image, without changing the position or size of the containing box. It should not be possible to move the image beyond any of its edges (i.e., leaving white bars inside the box).
properties.Steps: When an image is cropped, an extra handle appears, a circle in the middle of the image. This handle allows adjusting the cropping by moving the image, without changing the position or size of the containing box. It should not be possible to move the image beyond any of its edges (i.e., leaving white bars inside the box).

properties.Test Case: A cropped image can be resized. Resizing should preserve the cropping and the cropped aspect ratio.
properties.Steps: A cropped image can be resized. Resizing should preserve the cropping and the cropped aspect ratio.

properties.Test Case: Experiment with all bubble types, add children. Child bubbles that overlap should merge nicely.
properties.Steps: Experiment with all bubble types, add children. Child bubbles that overlap should merge nicely.
